_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 500

observed.note: brown realm 1, blue realm 2, green (clamped) realms 3+. ~30-33% across trials; deaths still split boss/room (~450 boss / ~229 room per 1000). Green clamps across every realm >=3, so even a tiny raw step (<=1.17x agility/HP over blue, armor untouched) is a real difficulty increase on top of 1.4^(size-1) scaling — a ~1.2x bump cratered it below the 25% floor in testing. Sits a modest step below the ~36% blue baseline.
